title: Agent Skill (.skill package) SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of every .skill package's SKILL.md file. See https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agents-and-tools/agent-skills/best-practices.md for the canonical reference. USAGE: this schema is not wired into validate-examples.sh (which only validates fenced ```json blocks against schemas). It exists as a reference for users authoring their own .skill packages — validate manually with: `ajv validate -s pipeline/schema/agent-skill-frontmatter.schema.json -d <(yq eval -o=json '.' my-skill/SKILL.md)`.

name.description: Skill identifier. Lowercase kebab-case only. Max 64 chars. Used by the skill matcher to dispatch.

description.description: Activation trigger description. The skill matcher reads this to decide whether the skill is relevant. Should enumerate intent patterns ('Use when...') and negative-intent patterns ('Skip: ...'). Max 1024 chars (longer is truncated).

user-invocable.description: Whether the user can invoke this skill explicitly by name (e.g. /skill-name). Defaults to false; only set true for skills meant for direct user invocation.

allowedTools.description: Optional tool allowlist for the skill. If absent, the skill inherits the host's tool permissions.
